rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MEGAN LOUISE FURTH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioner F. P. Furth For Protective Order To Extend Deadline Fpr Petitioner'S Deposition.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's motion for a protective order to extend the deadline for petitioner's deposition is granted in part. The prior order is modified as follows. The deposition of Frederick Furth shall commence and be completed prior to the taking of the deposition of Jerzy Sokol. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time to conduct the deposition of Frederick Furth. Said deposition shall be completed by November 14, 2005. The deposition of Jerzy Sokol. shall commence after the completion of the deposition of Frederick Furth. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to the scheduling of said deposition. (610/BEC)
